translations.tasbee7Subtitle: Special remembrance times calculated based on Fajr and midnight
translations.calculationMethodHint: Islamic calculation method for your region
translations.prayerOffsetsHint: Adjust Fajr and Maghrib times by ± minutes (e.g. +10 = 10 min later, -5 = 5 min earlier)
translations.audioDeviceHint: Select which speakers/headphones to use for Athan playback
translations.clickToBrowse: Click to browse or drag and drop
translations.noFilesAdded: No files added. Click ➕ Add to add audio files.
translations.noAudioFiles: No audio files available. Please upload audio files first.
translations.noTakbeerTimes: No Takbeer times added. Click ➕ Add Time.
translations.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete
translations.specialModesDesc: Enable Ramadan or Islamic Holiday modes to automatically switch to custom audio configurations on special occasions. Each mode can have its own unique set of Athan files.
translations.prayerAudioConfigDesc: Assign one or more audio files to each prayer. Files play in sequence when the prayer time arrives. Drag to reorder, click ▶️ Test to preview.
translations.tasbee7_1_desc: 1/3 of time between Fajr and midnight
translations.tasbee7_2_desc: 2/3 of time between Fajr and midnight
translations.tasbee7_3_desc: 1/2 of time between Fajr and Tasbee7 2
translations.ramadanModeHint: Use special audio configuration during Ramadan
translations.ramadanAudioSubtitle: Special audio files to play during the blessed month of Ramadan
translations.islamicHolidaysSubtitle: Upcoming Islamic celebrations and Takbeer times
translations.islamicHolidaysHint: Play Takbeer audio on Islamic holidays
translations.takbeerTimesSubtitle: Configure when Takbeer should be played during Islamic holidays
translations.themeAutomaticHint: Switches to Ramadan / Eid automatically based on date
translations.logConfigSubtitle: Control where logs are saved, rotation and verbosity level
translations.logFilePathHint: Relative or absolute path. Directories are created automatically.
translations.logLevelHint: Lower levels produce more output and larger files.
translations.logMaxSizeHint: Log file is rotated when it exceeds this size.
translations.logMaxHistoryHint: Number of rotated archive files to retain.
translations.logViewerLinesHint: How many tail lines to display in the viewer below.
translations.logNoMatch: No log lines match the current filter.
translations.logViewerPlaceholder: ✨ Click 🔄 Refresh or enable ⏵ Auto to load logs
